That number doesn't happen by accident. Nautilus Restaurant is earning it plate by plate, and the crowd keeps coming back.

If you're on the island and skipping this, you're skipping the most-rated dining experience here. Get there early. Grab everything.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
